{

"judge_id": "judge_2023_10",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.2": 5,
  "R1.3": 5,
  "R1.6": 5,
  "RX.1": 4,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.2": "The agent thoroughly checked the argument chain, identified multiple inconsistencies, and proposed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.",
  "R1.3": "Every load-bearing claim was audited against evidence, with questions raised about data specifics to ensure alignment.",
  "R1.6": "The draft underwent a careful copy-edit, improving clarity and conciseness without losing meaning.",
  "RX.1": "Uncertainty was flagged for several claims, but confidence levels for each recommendation weren't explicitly marked.",
  "RX.3": "Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope, with no deviations or drifts.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or regressions were introduced; potential harms were identified and mitigated.",
  "RX.5": "While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, reducing traceability."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.2": 0.9,
  "R1.3": 0.85,
  "R1.6": 0.95,
  "RX.1": 0.8,
  "RX.3": 0.9,
  "RX.4": 0.9,
  "RX.5": 0.7
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly checked the argument chain, identified multiple inconsistencies, and proposed fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement.
rationale.R1.3: Every load-bearing claim was audited against evidence, with questions raised about data specifics to ensure alignment.
rationale.R1.6: The draft underwent a careful copy-edit, improving clarity and conciseness without losing meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty was flagged for several claims, but confidence levels for each recommendation weren't explicitly marked.
rationale.RX.3: Output stayed strictly within the agreed scope, with no deviations or drifts.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced; potential harms were identified and mitigated.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked annotations, reducing traceability.
